title: Parestia elata
taxonomy: Parestia elata is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a part of the genus Parestia, which is a group of plants within the larger family of daisies. Parestia elata is closely related to other species within the Asteraceae family, which includes sunflowers, daisies, and zinnias. The plant's classification is further divided into its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Magnoliophyta), and class (Magnoliopsida). This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Parestia elata and other related species.
